creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
amavisd-new 2.7.1 was released on 2012-04-29. And there may be the case that NS_unix_path cannot be used.

In my case, /var/log/maillog contains many of lines:

  () (!)_DIE: Can't locate object method "NS_unix_path" via package "Net::Server::Proto::UNIX" at /usr/local/sbin/amavisd line 11107.

"s/NS_unix_path/NS_port/" to amavisd seems ok.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
